ddls:
CREATE TABLE "charts" (
  "chart_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each chart */,
  "chart_name" TEXT /* Name of the chart (e.g., Top 100, Billboard Hot 100) */,
  "chart_type" TEXT /* Type of chart (e.g., weekly, monthly, genre-specific) */,
  "chart_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the chart, including its significance and rules */,
  "chart_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the chart (e.g., weekly, monthly, daily) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("chart_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "songs" (
  "song_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each song */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the song */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artist who performed the song */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the song */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the song (e.g., pop, rock, hip-hop) */,
  "lyrics" TEXT /* Lyrics of the song */,
  "production_credits" TEXT /* Production credits for the song (e.g., producers, writers) */,
  "album_id" INTEGER /* ID of the album the song belongs to */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the song */,
  "is_explicit" INTEGER /* Indicates if the song contains explicit content */,
  "album_track_number" INTEGER /* Track number of the song on the album */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("song_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_songs_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "artists" (
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each artist */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the artist */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the artist */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre(s) the artist is associated with */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of origin of the artist */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* Links to the artist's social media profiles */,
  "profile_image_url" TEXT /* URL to the artist's profile image */,
  "active_years" TEXT /* Years the artist has been active (e.g., 1990-present) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "chart_entries" (
  "entry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each chart entry */,
  "song_id" INTEGER /* ID of the song that entered the chart */,
  "chart_id" INTEGER /* ID of the chart the song entered */,
  "entry_date" TEXT /* Date the song entered the chart */,
  "entry_position" INTEGER /* Position the song entered the chart at */,
  "peak_position" INTEGER /* Peak position the song reached on the chart */,
  "total_weeks" INTEGER /* Total number of weeks the song stayed on the chart */,
  "entry_type" TEXT /* Type of entry (e.g., debut, re-entry) */,
  "previous_position" INTEGER /* Position of the song in the previous chart */,
  "next_position" INTEGER /* Predicted position of the song in the next chart */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("entry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_chart_entries_chart_id FOREIGN KEY ("chart_id") REFERENCES charts ("chart_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_chart_entries_song_id FOREIGN KEY ("song_id") REFERENCES songs ("song_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  "parent_genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent genre (for hierarchical genre structure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_genres_parent_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lyrics" (
  "lyric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lyric */,
  "song_id" INTEGER /* ID of the song the lyric belongs to */,
  "lyric_text" TEXT /* Text of the lyric */,
  "lyric_language" TEXT /* Language of the lyrics */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lyric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lyrics_song_id FOREIGN KEY ("song_id") REFERENCES songs ("song_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "production_credits" (
  "credit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each production credit */,
  "song_id" INTEGER /* ID of the song the credit belongs to */,
  "credit_type" TEXT /* Type of production credit (e.g., producer, writer) */,
  "credit_name" TEXT /* Name of the person credited */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the role (e.g., lead producer, co-writer) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("credit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_production_credits_song_id FOREIGN KEY ("song_id") REFERENCES songs ("song_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, artist, analyst) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "profile_image_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile image */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the role belongs to */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., admin, artist, analyst) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON string of permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "chart_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each chart history entry */,
  "chart_id" INTEGER /* ID of the chart the history belongs to */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the chart history entry */,
  "position" INTEGER /* Position of the song on the chart at the given date */,
  "song_id" INTEGER /* ID of the song for which the history is recorded */,
  "chart_position" INTEGER /* Position of the song on the chart at the given date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_chart_history_song_id FOREIGN KEY ("song_id") REFERENCES songs ("song_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_chart_history_chart_id FOREIGN KEY ("chart_id") REFERENCES charts ("chart_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "song_genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre the song belongs to */,
  "song_id" INTEGER /* ID of the song the genre belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id", "song_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "chart_artists" (
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artist who appeared on the chart */,
  "chart_id" INTEGER /* ID of the chart the artist appeared on */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artist_id", "chart_id")
)
